caption: A woman with curly hair tied up is wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt in a podcast studio setting. She is smiling and laughing, looking slightly to her left. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of her. Behind her is a white wall with a yellow vertical stripe and a screen displaying the word "Johnson" in red text, with "Employee Only" written in smaller white letters above it. The "BOSS TALK 101" logo, which includes a red and white graphic and the word "PODCAST," is overlaid on the bottom of the scene. Across the frames, the woman's expression shifts as she continues to laugh and react, with slight changes in her head tilt and facial muscles, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
